text.heading: OBAFEMI AWOLOWO UNIVERSITY
ILE-IFE, NIGERIA
text.p: RE-CONNECTION OF OFFICES TO THE INTERNET

Since our discussion on the connection of our offices to the Internet, I have spoken to the Dean on the issue and he has facilitated the whole process by inviting INTECU to assess and give us the cost of connecting the offices. . The Director of INTENCU sent in the cost of connecting the 14 offices so identified on the 24th July, 2006 and it amounts to a total of N . A division of this with 14 gives us a rough estimate of N per person (please find attached the list of persons who showed interest).

You are therefore enjoined to please pay personally to me (Dr ) latest by Wednesday 16th August, 2006. Please let us honour this deadline as this will determine how soon we can have our offices connected.
